name: Grade 1 Mindful Movement — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 1 pathway for movement sequences, regulation strategies, resilience, and care for community. Learning builds independence through investigation, guided practice, application, and reflection.
learningGoals: Develop first-grade knowledge and skills in movement sequences, regulation strategies, resilience, and care for community.
Use speaking, drawing, writing, numbers, models, or movement to explain thinking.
Work independently when ready and ask for help, feedback, or clarification when needed.

lessons.title: Explore movement sequences, regulation strategies, resilience, and care for community
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record movement sequences, regulation strategies, resilience, and care for community by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

lessons.title: Practice movement sequences, regulation strategies, resilience, and care for community
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record movement sequences, regulation strategies, resilience, and care for community by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

resources.title: CASEL supporting practices
resources.description: Planning reference for this Grade 1 Mindful Movement pathway.

units.title: Investigate: movement sequences, regulation strategies, resilience, and care for community
units.essentialQuestion: What evidence can we gather about movement sequences, regulation strategies, resilience, and care for community?
outcomes: I can observe, discuss, and record movement sequences, regulation strategies, resilience, and care for community.
I can use accurate words, pictures, numbers, models, writing, or movement to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Explore movement sequences, regulation strategies, resilience, and care for community
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record movement sequences, regulation strategies, resilience, and care for community by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

activities.title: Notice and investigate
activities.learnerAction: The learner uses age-appropriate materials and first-grade vocabulary to observe, discuss, and record movement sequences, regulation strategies, resilience, and care for community. Adult supervision is provided whenever the subject involves tools, heat, animals, water, traffic, or online media.

successCriteria: The learner completes a first-grade task connected to movement sequences, regulation strategies, resilience, and care for community.
The learner explains an observation, choice, or strategy with appropriate support.
The learner follows safety, care, and collaboration expectations.
